Dear Dr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Analyst at Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd (UEN: T12LL3456A) with a starting annual salary of SGD 85,000. Your primary contact will be Mr. Ramasamy Muthu, Head of Research, reachable at +65 6123 4567 or r.muthu@quantumdynamics.sg.

The commencement date of your employment will be 5th December 2023. As part of your role, you will be required to provide monthly updates on the project status of various initiatives. This offer is extended subject to the successful completion of the pre-employment checks and a non-disclosure agreement (the "NDA"). The NDA will be discussed during your first day.

Please note, this offer is not contingent on an existing project plan, and any ongoing project status reports must be submitted within the stipulated deadlines.

For verification purposes, kindly use the following link to confirm your acceptance: https://example.sg/verify/S8765432H. This link is unique to your NRIC number, which remains confidential.

Should you have any questions, feel free to contact Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah at +65 9876 5432 or aishah.abdullah@quantumdynamics.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Sincerely,

Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd  
Mr. Ramasamy Muthu  
Head of Research
